refinement_sections.content: The company has a customer database with over a million records, and queries are slow. I need to find out why this is happening and how to fix it.
I should look at how the database is currently set up, especially how it uses indexes. I need to check what types of queries are slow.
The goal is to make the queries faster by changing the indexing strategy. I need to suggest a new way to organize the indexes.
I should think about how changing the indexes will affect the speed of adding or changing customer records. I also need to make sure that the data stays accurate.
The report should include the new indexing plan, how much faster I expect the queries to be, and any problems that might come up from the changes.
